entity.label: Haruz
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Eager, the father of Meshullemeth, the wife of king Manasseh (2 Kings 21:19) and mother of king Amon.

nodes.label: Haruz
nodes.description: Eager, the father of Meshullemeth, the wife of king Manasseh (2 Kings 21:19) and mother of king Amon.

nodes.label: Meshullemeth
nodes.description: Friend, the wife of Manasseh, and the mother of Amon (2 Kings 21:19), Kings of Judah.

verses.text: Amon was twenty and two years old when he began to reign, and he reigned two years in Jerusalem. And his mother’s name was Meshullemeth, the daughter of Haruz of Jotbah.
